$comment: OpenSSF Scorecard accepted baseline. Checks below their accepted floor should fail the local release gate unless they are listed in acceptedRisks. Accepted risks are documented as expected for a single-maintainer project.

acceptedRisks.reason: Single-maintainer project; required reviews and signed commits are not practical without additional contributors. Branch protection is enabled with admin enforcement, force-push disabled, and deletion disabled. Local build/test gates are run before release work is pushed.
acceptedRisks.revisitWhen: A second maintainer joins the project.

acceptedRisks.reason: Single-maintainer project; all commits are direct pushes. Code quality is maintained through local tests, static analysis, and the research/build machine separation.
acceptedRisks.revisitWhen: A second maintainer joins the project.

acceptedRisks.reason: OpenSSF CII badge program enrollment is deferred until the project has a stable v4.0 release and community adoption.
Property-based testing with FsCheck is planned; OSS-Fuzz enrollment is deferred.
SignPath Foundation enrollment is pending. Local releases ship with SHA256 checksums and CycloneDX SBOM output but are not yet Authenticode-signed or covered by GitHub provenance attestations.
Package-manager distribution (winget, Scoop, Chocolatey, Velopack) is blocked on the rebrand decision and signing.
acceptedRisks.revisitWhen: Package identity is finalized and signing is complete.
